about.short-description: Specialized in creating high-impact, accessible, and results-oriented web interfaces that connect people with technology.
about.description: Frontend Developer with strong experience in building scalable and optimized web applications using React, Angular, JavaScript, and modern CSS. Backed by a Systems Engineering foundation and an extensive track record in implementing enterprise software solutions (ERPs and integrations in healthcare and commerce). My approach combines user-centered design (UX/UI) with clean development practices to deliver accessible, high-performance web products that drive business value.

short-profile.description: Frontend Developer focused on building interactive and scalable web experiences.

summary.title: My Preparation and Experience
summary.first-job-description: Led the implementation and deployment of CNT software in various hospitals in Colombia, training medical and administrative staff on clinical modules.
summary.second-job-description: Provided Tier 2 and Tier 3 technical support for administrative and financial modules, optimizing billing workflows and hospital system integrations.
summary.third-job-description: Managed the institutional CNT ERP platform. Led an interdisciplinary technical support team and was responsible for staff training and technical planning.
summary.fourth-job-description: Developed reusable, interactive UI components using React, Next.js, and Material UI. Collaborated in agile teams under Scrum methodology, optimizing web page load speeds and ensuring design consistency.
summary.last-job-description: Designed and implemented the admin dashboard and ERP modules using Angular and NestJS. Additionally, led the development of robotic process automation (RPA) workflows with Automation 360 for Banco de la Mujer, optimizing financial and operational business processes.

portfolio.title: Project Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: A curated selection of real-world projects showing my capability to solve business needs with clean code and high-quality UI design.
portfolio.proj1-desc: A digital platform to preserve and promote musical talent in the Eastern Antioquia region. Designed a responsive, accessible interface connecting artists and cultural managers.
portfolio.proj2-desc: A high-conversion commercial landing page for booking mariachi services. Optimized for local SEO and mobile performance, significantly boosting direct customer inquiries.
portfolio.proj3-desc: An elegant e-commerce catalog for high-quality handmade string crafts. Developed a fluid user interface with smooth animations that showcase product details and ease buying paths.
portfolio.proj4-desc: An interactive web app for estimating bicycle maintenance costs and scheduling repair appointments. Built on a modular architecture for optimal speed and codebase scalability.
